name: Pataki SDP Rank Bound (1998)
source: G. Pataki, 'On the rank of extreme matrices in semidefinite programs and the multiplicity of optimal eigenvalues', Math. Oper. Res. 23(2), 339-358, 1998. Result: If X is an extreme point of the spectrahedron {X ∈ PSD_n : ⟨A_j, X⟩ = β_j}, then r(r+1)/2 ≤ m where r = rank(X). JOURNAL PAPER — PAYWALLED.
